target_response: target uptake field stored by each completed frozen step
H_star_basis: E-held values equal t0 values at transport before uptake on update 1; post-uptake E parents can alter the returned state on update 1 and therefore target transport/readout on update 2

first_update.binding_static_conflict: The mission requires unqualified first-update E invariance, but the exact preprobe-reference candidate reaches U/V, Mf, c, and N after the first uptake within the same returned update. Full returned-state invariance is structurally impossible without changing the committed reference convention or activation window.

target_destination_external_parents: rho and c at every outside endpoint of a target boundary face
conditional donor C/rho for every cohort
conditional donor Mf/rho for every memory component
update_order.reason: all reads are from the exact t0 arrays and references equal those arrays

target_destination_external_parents: post-growth outside u=U/rho at four neighbours
post-growth outside v=V/rho at four neighbours
update_order.reason: outside u/v are recomputed after transport, uptake, and death and need not equal preprobe references

target_destination_external_parents: outside alive indicators in global up_ref denominator
outside current uptake in global up_ref numerator
outside post-growth m_k in four-neighbour lap
pre-step outside c at four neighbours
update_order.reason: m_minus can already differ through the E-gated writer

target_destination_external_parents: post-uptake outside N at four neighbours decomposed as r_N+P(t)+dynamic innovation
update_order.reservoir_identity: target reservoir remains F*(N0-target_N); it is logged, not independently gated

update_order.next_response_path: changed returned U/V/Mf/c/N plus held/open update-2 boundary parents reach update-2 transport and uptake

H_star_paths: E outside u/v at update-1 toggle -> target U/V returned -> update-2 sig -> update-2 uptake
E external up_ref or m stencil at update-1 writer -> target Mf returned -> update-2 m_plus -> update-2 uptake
E outside N at update-1 nutrient update -> target N returned -> update-2 uptake
E boundary c/N/rho/donor innovations at update-2 transport -> target transported state -> update-2 uptake

arm_contract.clone_order: compile immutable plan from common t0, hash references, clone common state independently for each arm, apply common P(t), execute no arm from another arm
arm_contract.polarity: 1 means available/open in Y^a(l,e); K labels and Y_i^k are forbidden from the Stage-A implementation
arm_contract.composition: local and E plans change disjoint parent slots; canonical compilation must be order-independent

accounting_identities.input_state_preservation: hash(input after step call)=hash(input before step call)
accounting_identities.boundary_face_ledger: for each target boundary destination, field, axis and orientation record active_target_contribution-open_target_contribution
accounting_identities.up_ref: record S_A,n_A,S_B,n_B,S_B0,n_B0,selected numerator,selected denominator and selected scalar
accounting_identities.probe: record r_N,P(t),dynamic residual and recomposed external N separately
accounting_identities.persistent_overwrite: zero assignments to input arrays; output state schema equals frozen IOMState schema
accounting_identities.numerical_tolerance: gamma_n=sum_abs_terms*n*eps/(1-n*eps) for the exact number n of floating additions in the checked ledger; byte equality where no reduction is required
